# Alchemix Documentation

> Alchemix is a DeFi protocol offering self-repaying loans. Deposit ETH or USDC, borrow up to 90% LTV at 0% interest, and yield automatically repays the debt. No price-based liquidations. Live on Ethereum, Optimism, and Arbitrum.
> Generated: 2026-03-30

---

## User Documentation

### Getting Started
- [Quick Start](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/quick-start): Deposit, borrow, and manage a self-repaying loan step by step
- [V3 Migration](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/v3-migration): How to migrate from Alchemix V2 to V3
- [FAQ](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/faq): Common questions about borrowing, repayment, earmarking, and fees

### Core Concepts
- [Self-Repaying Loans](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/concepts/self-repaying-loans): How loans work — 0% interest, 90% LTV, automatic repayment via yield
- [Mix-Yield Token (MYT)](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/concepts/myt-and-yield): DAO-curated yield basket used as collateral
- [Transmuter](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/concepts/transmuter): Fixed-rate yield via 1:1 alAsset redemption over a set term
- [alAssets](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/concepts/alAssets): Synthetic debt tokens (alUSD, alETH) — minting, market price, peg mechanics
- [Redemption Rate](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/concepts/redemption-rate): How fast the system deleverages positions, temporal leverage explained
- [Liquidations](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/concepts/liquidations): When and how liquidation can occur (no price-based liquidation)
- [Fees](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/concepts/fees): Protocol fee structure (redemption, yield, transmuter fees)
- [How the Peg is Maintained](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/concepts/how-peg-is-maintained): Mechanisms keeping alAsset prices near 1:1
- [Glossary](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/glossary): Key terms defined

### Tutorials
- [Deposit and Borrow](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/tutorials/deposit-and-borrow): Step-by-step borrowing guide
- [Borrowing in Alchemix](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/tutorials/borrowing-in-alchemix): Detailed borrowing walkthrough
- [Repay Loan](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/tutorials/repay-loan): How to repay early or manage debt
- [Redeem alAssets](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/tutorials/redeem-alassets): Using the Transmuter for fixed-rate yield
- [Use Passive MYT](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/tutorials/use-passive-myt): Earning yield without borrowing

### Safety
- [Risk Considerations](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/safety/risk-considerations): Understanding protocol risks
- [Security](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/safety/security): Audits and security practices

### Reference
- [Links](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/links): Official links and resources
- [Financial Reports](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/financial-reports): Protocol financial data
- [Marketing Material](https://docs.alchemix.fi/user/marketing-material): Brand assets and marketing resources

---

## Developer Documentation

### Architecture
- [Overview](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/architecture/overview): System architecture and component relationships
- [Redemptions](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/architecture/redemptions): How redemptions flow through the system
- [Security Model](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/architecture/security-model): Protocol security architecture

### Alchemist (Core Lending)
- [Alchemist Contract](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/alchemist/alchemist-contract): Core lending contract reference
- [CDP Mechanics](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/alchemist/cdp-mechanics): Collateralized debt position internals
- [Earmarking](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/alchemist/earmarking): How collateral is earmarked for redemptions
- [Abstract Fee Vault Contract](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/alchemist/abstract-fee-vault-contract): Fee vault implementation
- [Alchemist ETH Vault Contract](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/alchemist/alchemist-eth-vault-contract): ETH-specific vault
- [Alchemist Token Vault Contract](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/alchemist/alchemist-token-vault-contract): ERC-20 token vault

### MYT (Mix-Yield Token)
- [Mix-Yield Token Overview](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/myt/mix-yield-token): MYT design and mechanics
- [MYT Contract](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/myt/myt-contract): Core MYT vault contract reference
- [Alchemist Allocator Contract](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/myt/alchemist-allocator-contract): Strategy allocation logic
- [Alchemist Curator Contract](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/myt/alchemist-curator-contract): Curator role and permissions
- [Alchemist Strategy Classifier Contract](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/myt/alchemist-strategy-classifier-contract): Strategy risk classification
- [Permissioned Proxy Contract](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/myt/permissioned-proxy-contract): Proxy permissions

### Transmuter
- [Transmuter Overview](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/transmuter/overview): Transmuter design and mechanics
- [Redemption Mechanics](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/transmuter/redemption-mechanics): How redemptions are processed
- [Transmuter Contract](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/transmuter/transmuter-contract): Contract reference

### Integration Guides
- [Integrate Alchemist](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/integration/integrate-alchemist): How to integrate the core lending contract
- [Integrate Transmuter](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/integration/integrate-transmuter): Transmuter integration guide
- [Integrate MYT](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/integration/integrate-myt): MYT vault integration guide
- [Using alAssets](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/integration/using-alassets): Building with alUSD and alETH
- [Grants Program](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/integration/grants-program): Funding for builders

### Contract Addresses
- [Ethereum](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/contracts/ethereum): Mainnet contract addresses
- [Optimism](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/contracts/optimism): OP Mainnet contract addresses
- [Arbitrum](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/contracts/arbitrum): Arbitrum One contract addresses

### Reference
- [Developer FAQ](https://docs.alchemix.fi/dev/faq): Common integration and contract questions

---

## Governance

- [Governance Overview](https://docs.alchemix.fi/governance/intro): How the Alchemix DAO works
- [Governance Process](https://docs.alchemix.fi/governance/onchain/governance-process): Proposal lifecycle
- [How to Vote](https://docs.alchemix.fi/governance/onchain/how-to-vote): Voting guide
- [vqALCX](https://docs.alchemix.fi/governance/onchain/vqalcx): Vote-escrowed governance token
- [On-Chain Infrastructure](https://docs.alchemix.fi/governance/onchain/onchain-governance-infrastructure): Governance contracts
- [Contract Roles](https://docs.alchemix.fi/governance/guides/contract-roles): Permission model
- [MYT Strategies](https://docs.alchemix.fi/governance/guides/myt-strategies): How the DAO manages yield strategies

- [Why Integrate](https://docs.alchemix.fi/projects/why-integrate/use-cases): Use cases for integrating Alchemix

- [Getting Started](https://docs.alchemix.fi/projects/how-to/getting-started): Integration quick start
- [Friendly Fork](https://docs.alchemix.fi/projects/how-to/friendly-fork): How to fork Alchemix

- [Co-Marketing](https://docs.alchemix.fi/projects/support/co-marketing): Joint marketing opportunities
